raw_consumer_statement:
Hello, Had an appointment at an XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  in XXXX XXXX, XXXX. 

It was supposed to be a free consultation appointment. They didn't inform me until after the x rays and consultation with dentist there would be any cost. I used my American Express card under duress, that like most doctor offices it's a locked door between the entrance to building. 

I've attempted multiple times to dispute the charge based on it being scheduled under the premise of free appointment, only to be asked for money afterwards. That I expected no cost, the American Express is all I had on me. 

American Express is stating that I used my card, I'm responsible. The charge was under duress, so should not be valid. Also the original vendors deceptive practices are illegal under section 5 of FTC Act. 

Feel I'm being taking advantage of by the businesses and need help to resolve.
